pages.reasonForQuarantine: Detected ASP.NET Identity, membership, or heavyweight account-control usage that the CLI cannot safely preserve in the generated compile surface. FormsAuthentication usage is not page-codebehind safe.
pages.suggestedMigrationApproach: Rebuild this flow with ASP.NET Core Identity, EditForm, and app-specific authentication endpoints before restoring the page logic. Port the remaining server-control or lifecycle logic into BWFC-compatible components, services, or semantic patterns before re-enabling the page.
